hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then DIFF=$(git diff --cached 2>/dev/null); if echo "$DIFF" | grep -qE '(/home/[a-z_][a-z0-9_]+/|192\.168\.|10\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.|[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\.[a-zA-Z]{2,}\.[a-zA-Z]{2,}|[A-Za-z0-9+/]{40,})'; then echo 'WARNING: staged diff may contain absolute paths, IPs, domains, or tokens — run /privacy-audit before committing' >&2; fi; fi; exit 0
